subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! The multitude of tasks, burdens, tribulations, and perils leave not a moment's respite for the wielding of the pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان از کثرت مشاغل و زحمات و غوائل و مخاطرات فرصت تحریر ابدا نیست
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
